testcase.name: testGetSingleJobById on testGetSingleJobById(com.jobportal.tests.api.GetAllJobsTest)
testcase.system-out:
Usage: <main class> [options] The XML suite files to run Options: -alwaysrunlisteners Should MethodInvocation Listeners be run even for skipped methods Default: true -configfailurepolicy Configuration failure policy (skip or continue) -d Output directory -dataproviderthreadcount Number of threads to use when running data providers -dependencyinjectorfactory The dependency injector factory implementation that TestNG should use. -excludegroups Comma-separated list of group names to exclude -failwheneverythingskipped Should TestNG fail execution if all tests were skipped and nothing was run. Default: false -generateResultsPerSuite Should TestNG consider failures in Data Providers as test failures. Default: false -groups Comma-separated list of group names to be run -ignoreMissedTestNames Ignore missed test names given by '-testnames' and continue to run existing tests, if any. Default: false -includeAllDataDrivenTestsWhenSkipping Should TestNG report all iterations of a data driven test as individual skips, in-case of upstream failures. Default: false -junit JUnit mode Default: false -listener List of .class files or list of class names implementing ITestListener or ISuiteListener -methods Comma separated of test methods Default: [] -methodselectors List of .class files or list of class names implementing IMethodSelector -mixed Mixed mode - autodetect the type of current test and run it with appropriate runner Default: false -objectfactory List of .class files or list of class names implementing ITestRunnerFactory -overrideincludedmethods Comma separated fully qualified class names of listeners that should be skipped from being wired in via Service Loaders. Default: false -parallel Parallel mode (methods, tests or classes) Possible Values: [tests, methods, classes, instances, none] -port The port -propagateDataProviderFailureAsTestFailure Should TestNG consider failures in Data Providers as test failures. Default: false -reporter Extended configuration for custom report listener -spilistenerstoskip Comma separated fully qualified class names of listeners that should be skipped from being wired in via Service Loaders. Default: <empty string> -suitename Default name of test suite, if not specified in suite definition file or source code -suitethreadpoolsize Size of the thread pool to use to run suites Default: 1 -testclass The list of test classes -testjar A jar file containing the tests -testname Default name of test, if not specified in suitedefinition file or source code -testnames The list of test names to run -testrunfactory, -testRunFactory The factory used to create tests -threadcount Number of threads to use when running tests in parallel -threadpoolfactoryclass The threadpool executor factory implementation that TestNG should use. -usedefaultlisteners Whether to use the default listeners Default: true -log, -verbose Level of verbosity -xmlpathinjar The full path to the xml file inside the jar file (only valid if -testjar was specified) Default: testng.xml
Get Single Job Test Passed for ID: 685d09750570fbbf1d8b2fc8
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: testGetAllJobsSuccess on testGetAllJobsSuccess(com.jobportal.tests.api.GetAllJobsTest)
testcase.system-out: Get All Jobs Response: [{"_id":"685d09750570fbbf1d8b2fc8","title":"Figma Desiner","description":"📌 TASK: Allow Recruiter to View Uploaded Resume for Each Job Application 🎯 GOAL: When a recruiter goes to the “View Applications” page, they should be able to see the resume that the job seeker submitted along with their other application details. --- 🛠️ WHAT TO DO: 1. ✅ BACKEND: - When saving the application, make sure the resume file path is stored in the database (e.g., `application.resume = req.file.path`). - While fetching applications (`GET /applications/:jobId` or similar), return the resume file path or URL along with other applicant data. 2. ✅ FRONTEND (Recruiter View Page): - Display each application’s details including: - Name - Email - Phone - Cover letter - Resume: Add a **"View Resume"** or **"Download Resume"** button next to each applicant. - The resume button should open the uploaded PDF (or DOCX) in a new tab using: ```jsx View Resume ","location":"Navi Mumbai","type":"full-time","salary":"50 - 80","employer":{"_id":"6852e3dd43865846fb6e3991","name":"Prem lee","email":"leethakare69@gmail.com"},"company":"Let's Upgrade","requirements":[],"createdAt":"2025-06-26T08:48:53.454Z","__v":0},{"_id":"685d04960570fbbf1d8b2eed","title":"Software Developer","description":"Job Description Job Description 📝 Job Description: We are looking for a passionate and motivated Frontend Developer with basic knowledge of React.js to join our growing team. This is a great opportunity for someone who has recently started learning web development and is eager to grow in a supportive and collaborative environment. 🧠 Responsibilities: Build and maintain user-facing features using React.js Collaborate with backend developers and designers to improve usability Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code Troubleshoot and debug application issues Participate in code reviews and share your learning with the team 🎯 Requirements: Basic understanding of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.js Familiarity with version control tools like Git Willingness to learn new tools and technologies Good communication and problem-solving skills Passion for building web applications 💼 Preferred Skills (Not Mandatory): Experience with any CSS framework (Tailwind, Bootstrap) Knowledge of REST APIs Familiarity with tools like VS Code, Postman, etc. 💬 About Us: We are a small, friendly tech startup that values learning, collaboration, and innovation. You'll be part of a team where your ideas matter and your growth is a priority. No toxic deadlines. No big egos.","location":"U.S.A","type":"full-time","salary":"50000 - 60000","employer":{"_id":"6852e3dd43865846fb6e3991","name":"Prem lee","email":"leethakare69@gmail.com"},"company":"JPMorgan","requirements":[],"createdAt":"2025-06-26T08:28:06.570Z","__v":0},{"_id":"68541c66c2636ac6e31b4c12","title":"UI/UX Desiner","description":"Job Description 📝 Job Description: We are looking for a passionate and motivated Frontend Developer with basic knowledge of React.js to join our growing team. This is a great opportunity for someone who has recently started learning web development and is eager to grow in a supportive and collaborative environment. 🧠 Responsibilities: Build and maintain user-facing features using React.js Collaborate with backend developers and designers to improve usability Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code Troubleshoot and debug application issues Participate in code reviews and share your learning with the team 🎯 Requirements: Basic understanding of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.js Familiarity with version control tools like Git Willingness to learn new tools and technologies Good communication and problem-solving skills Passion for building web applications 💼 Preferred Skills (Not Mandatory): Experience with any CSS framework (Tailwind, Bootstrap) Knowledge of REST APIs Familiarity with tools like VS Code, Postman, etc. 💬 About Us: We are a small, friendly tech startup that values learning, collaboration, and innovation. You'll be part of a team where your ideas matter and your growth is a priority. No toxic deadlines. No big egos.","location":"France","type":"full-time","salary":"50000 - 60000","employer":{"_id":"6852e3dd43865846fb6e3991","name":"Prem lee","email":"leethakare69@gmail.com"},"company":"Microsoft","requirements":[],"createdAt":"2025-06-19T14:19:18.764Z","__v":0},{"_id":"68541c42c2636ac6e31b4c09","title":"Frontend Developer","description":"Job Description 📝 Job Description: We are looking for a passionate and motivated Frontend Developer with basic knowledge of React.js to join our growing team. This is a great opportunity for someone who has recently started learning web development and is eager to grow in a supportive and collaborative environment. 🧠 Responsibilities: Build and maintain user-facing features using React.js Collaborate with backend developers and designers to improve usability Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code Troubleshoot and debug application issues Participate in code reviews and share your learning with the team 🎯 Requirements: Basic understanding of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.js Familiarity with version control tools like Git Willingness to learn new tools and technologies Good communication and problem-solving skills Passion for building web applications 💼 Preferred Skills (Not Mandatory): Experience with any CSS framework (Tailwind, Bootstrap) Knowledge of REST APIs Familiarity with tools like VS Code, Postman, etc. 💬 About Us: We are a small, friendly tech startup that values learning, collaboration, and innovation. You'll be part of a team where your ideas matter and your growth is a priority. No toxic deadlines. No big egos.","location":"China","type":"full-time","salary":"50000 - 60000","employer":{"_id":"6852e3dd43865846fb6e3991","name":"Prem lee","email":"leethakare69@gmail.com"},"company":"JPMorgan","requirements":[],"createdAt":"2025-06-19T14:18:42.192Z","__v":0},{"_id":"68541c0dc2636ac6e31b4c00","title":"FullStack Developer","description":"Job Description 📝 Job Description: We are looking for a passionate and motivated Frontend Developer with basic knowledge of React.js to join our growing team. This is a great opportunity for someone who has recently started learning web development and is eager to grow in a supportive and collaborative environment. 🧠 Responsibilities: Build and maintain user-facing features using React.js Collaborate with backend developers and designers to improve usability Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code Troubleshoot and debug application issues Participate in code reviews and share your learning with the team 🎯 Requirements: Basic understanding of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.js Familiarity with version control tools like Git Willingness to learn new tools and technologies Good communication and problem-solving skills Passion for building web applications 💼 Preferred Skills (Not Mandatory): Experience with any CSS framework (Tailwind, Bootstrap) Knowledge of REST APIs Familiarity with tools like VS Code, Postman, etc. 💬 About Us: We are a small, friendly tech startup that values learning, collaboration, and innovation. You'll be part of a team where your ideas matter and your growth is a priority. No toxic deadlines. No big egos.","location":"Canada","type":"full-time","salary":"50000 - 60000","employer":{"_id":"6852e3dd43865846fb6e3991","name":"Prem lee","email":"leethakare69@gmail.com"},"company":"Google","requirements":[],"createdAt":"2025-06-19T14:17:49.960Z","__v":0},{"requirements":[],"_id":"6853b4a24469809681cf1a05","title":"Backend Developer","description":"📌 Project Overview: We are building a Job Portal using the MERN Stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js). This project will include features for job seekers and employers such as posting jobs, applying to jobs, user authentication, and more. The focus is on building a full-stack web application with clean code and no overly advanced logic – perfect for beginner to intermediate developers. 🛠️ Responsibilities: Develop frontend pages using React.js (Home, Jobs Listing, Apply Page, Login/Register). Build backend APIs using Express.js and Node.js. Implement MongoDB database models for users, jobs, and applications. Handle user authentication (login/register) using JWT or sessions. Create job posting and application features. Add basic admin panel features for job approvals and user management. Ensure basic responsive design using CSS or a framework like Tailwind. ✅ Requirements: Basic knowledge of JavaScript, React, Node, and MongoDB. Familiarity with REST APIs and CRUD operations. Understanding of basic authentication (JWT or session). Able to organize code in folders (routes, models, controllers). Willingness to write readable and maintainable code (no complex logic). ✨ Bonus Skills (Optional): Experience with React Router for navigation. Using Postman for API testing. Knowledge of Mongoose for database interaction. Basic understanding of deploying using Render or Vercel. 🎯 Outcome: By the end of this project, we should have a functioning job portal with: User Registration & Login Job Listings and Filters Job Application Functionality Employer Job Post Submission Admin Dashboard","location":"UK","type":"full-time","salary":"$50000 - $60000","employer":{"_id":"6852e3dd43865846fb6e3991","name":"Prem lee","email":"leethakare69@gmail.com"},"company":"JPMorgan","createdAt":"2025-06-19T06:56:34.556Z","__v":0},{"requirements":[],"_id":"6852e55143865846fb6e39aa","title":"Markating","description":"📝 Job Description: We are looking for a passionate and motivated Frontend Developer with basic knowledge of React.js to join our growing team. This is a great opportunity for someone who has recently started learning web development and is eager to grow in a supportive and collaborative environment. 🧠 Responsibilities: Build and maintain user-facing features using React.js Collaborate with backend developers and designers to improve usability Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code Troubleshoot and debug application issues Participate in code reviews and share your learning with the team 🎯 Requirements: Basic understanding of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.js Familiarity with version control tools like Git Willingness to learn new tools and technologies Good communication and problem-solving skills Passion for building web applications 💼 Preferred Skills (Not Mandatory): Experience with any CSS framework (Tailwind, Bootstrap) Knowledge of REST APIs Familiarity with tools like VS Code, Postman, etc. 💬 About Us: We are a small, friendly tech startup that values learning, collaboration, and innovation. You'll be part of a team where your ideas matter and your growth is a priority. No toxic deadlines. No big egos.","location":"Navi Mumbai","type":"full-time","salary":"$50 - $80","employer":{"_id":"6852e3dd43865846fb6e3991","name":"Prem lee","email":"leethakare69@gmail.com"},"company":"Let's Upgrade","createdAt":"2025-06-18T16:12:01.495Z","__v":0},{"requirements":[],"_id":"6852e50f43865846fb6e39a1","title":"MERN Stack Developer","description":"📝 Job Description: We are looking for a passionate and motivated Frontend Developer with basic knowledge of React.js to join our growing team. This is a great opportunity for someone who has recently started learning web development and is eager to grow in a supportive and collaborative environment. 🧠 Responsibilities: Build and maintain user-facing features using React.js Collaborate with backend developers and designers to improve usability Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code Troubleshoot and debug application issues Participate in code reviews and share your learning with the team 🎯 Requirements: Basic understanding of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.js Familiarity with version control tools like Git Willingness to learn new tools and technologies Good communication and problem-solving skills Passion for building web applications 💼 Preferred Skills (Not Mandatory): Experience with any CSS framework (Tailwind, Bootstrap) Knowledge of REST APIs Familiarity with tools like VS Code, Postman, etc. 💬 About Us: We are a small, friendly tech startup that values learning, collaboration, and innovation. You'll be part of a team where your ideas matter and your growth is a priority. No toxic deadlines. No big egos.","location":"CA","type":"internship","salary":"$50000 - $60000","employer":{"_id":"6852e3dd43865846fb6e3991","name":"Prem lee","email":"leethakare69@gmail.com"},"company":"Google","createdAt":"2025-06-18T16:10:55.961Z","__v":0}]
